/opt/rh/devtoolset-7/root/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fopenmp -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -shared -Wl,-soname,libenvMatrixOp_bind.so -o ../../lib/descriptor/deepmd/libenvMatrixOp_bind.so CMakeFiles/envMatrixOp_bind.dir/bind/envMatrixOp_bind.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib:/data/home/liuhanyu/hyliu/code/AI2Pot/source/build/lib/descriptor/deepmd:/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so ../../lib/descriptor/deepmd/libenvMatrixOp.so /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/libpython3.9.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so -lpthread
